status_legend.match: Screenshot text appears consistent with current calculator values/logic.
status_legend.match_name_variant: Values/logic match, but skill spelling differs between screenshot and sheet.
status_legend.needs_clarification: Potential mismatch; screenshot interpretation vs sheet logic is ambiguous.
status_legend.mismatch: Screenshot text conflicts with current sheet/logic behavior.
